LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WAI YEM'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE AT THE HEARING A PROOF OF SERVICE SHOWING THAT THE MOTION TO VACATE WAS PROPERLY SERVED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-15-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
